title: pelargonium × alstromeriae
intro: Pelargonium × alstromeriae, also known as Mountain Rose, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium vitifusium. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mountain Rose include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, often used in traditional medicine and as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
